entity.summary: Protocol-native liquidity-provider-backed constant-product automated market maker on Tempo that converts a user's selected TIP-20 fee token into a validator-preferred TIP-20 and distributes swap fees to liquidity providers.
entity.notes: Current first-party Tempo documentation specifies the Fee AMM, and the official tempoxyz/tempo repository publishes its precompiled Fee Manager implementation. The AMM is predeployed at a fixed address and emits RebalanceSwap events for active conversions. No exact public launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted in this record.

evidence.title: Tempo Fee AMM specification
evidence.notes: First-party protocol specification describes the LP-backed constant-product Fee AMM, fee-token conversion flow, and validator-token settlement behavior.

evidence.title: Tempo Fee Manager precompile implementation
evidence.notes: Official Tempo repository publishes the current Fee Manager and Fee AMM precompile implementation, including swap events, pool state, fee constants, and rebalancing logic.
